title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Delhi University Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Delhi University Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Delhi University Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Delhi University Digital Technologies:
Delhi University Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhi University Digital Technologies!
